info.english_meaning: to disappearto perishto get destroyed to be invisible
info.hindI_arTa: adarSana honA nASa honA diKAI na denA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yA preva naSyasi' (f॰10.146.1) praRaSyasi=tiroBavasi tiroDatse antarDatse
'ADiH praRaSyed dviguRe Dane yadi na mocyate' (yAjYa॰2.58)
'tasyAhaM na praRaSyAmi sa ca me na praRaSyati' (gItA 6.30) nityaM sannidaDa ityarTaH ahaM madBaktasya hadi sannivizwaH sa ca mayoti tAtparyArTaH
'pranaMzwumayatizwa ca' (Bawwi॰15.58) pranaMzwuM palAyituM prAyasadityarTaH..
'apanaSya Dik tvA jAlmAstu' (SAM॰brA॰30.5) apanaSyeti naSerloRmaDyamEkavacane rUpam apaDvaMsetyAha
'GoratvaM sampraRaSyati' (BA0 vana0 20780) sampraRaSyati=vinaSyati=naSyati
'prajASca tasya kzIyante tataH so'nuvinaSyati' (BA0 SAM0 9038) saha naSyati samaM vA naSyatItyAha
'kAmAnusArI puruzaH kAmAnanuvinaSyati' (BA0 126533) ukto'rTaH
'vijYAnaGana evEteByo BUteByaH samutTAya tAnyevAnuvinaSyati' (bf0 u0 2412) anuvinaSyati=tatrEva lIyate
'avaneSuH kurURAM hi vIryARi arjunAd BayAt' (BA0 41728) avaneSuH=tiroBAvaM jagmuH
'nirnazwanAmakftya-' (rAja0 183) nitarAM nazwAni nAmakftyAni yezAM te
'nizkravyAdamanInaSat' (f0 101622) niranInaSat samUlakAzamakazat samUlamudacCinat
'niSamya tallakzmaRamAtfvAkyaM …SanEH SarIre vinanASa SokaH Saradgato meGa ivAlpatoyaH' (rA0 24431)..
'vi zu viSvA arAtayo'ryo naSanta no DiyaH' (f0 101333)
'kriyAH sarvA vinaSyanti grIzme kusarito yaTA' (hitopa0)
'aSastI rvi hi nInaSaH' (f0 64817) vinInaSaH=vyanInaSaH=vyanASayaH aSastIH=aBiSastIH dozAropakARi kaTanAni anizwAni vacAMsi
'brAhmaRezu pramUQezu Darmo vipraRaSed Druvam' (BA0 133083) vipraRaSet vipraRaSyet tiroBavet parABavet
'api SvapAke Suni vA na dAnaM vipraRaSyati' (BA0 133212) vipraRaSyati nizPalaM Bavati
'avipraRASaH sarvezAM karmaRAmiti niScayaH' (BA0 ASrama0 344) Palavanti karmARi Bavanti nAPalAnItyAha
'yaste yudDamayaM darpaM kAmaM ca vyapanASayet' (BA0) vyapanASayet vinASayet
'nedimA~llokAnatipraRaSyAni' (Sa0 brA0 67216) eByo lokeByo hIyeyeti mA BUt
'Candasi tu vyAptO vartate mA no dIrGA aBinaSan tamisrAH' (f0 22714) nigadavyAKyAtam
